description: Variables the agent walks the owner through on first admin chat. The agent collects answers then calls apply_template_variables to substitute them across files_to_substitute. Mark complete by overwriting this file with { completed: true, completed_at: ... }.

variables.prompt: What should the agent call itself in chat? (e.g. 'CP', 'Maya')
Cuisine — full descriptor (e.g. 'Malabar / Kerala coastal', 'Neapolitan pizza', 'Levantine')
Country or region you operate in (e.g. 'UAE', 'New York')
Languages the agent should speak (e.g. 'English', 'English, Arabic')
Currency code (3 letters: AED, USD, EUR, GBP, INR...)
Location phrase (e.g. 'in the heart of Dubai Marina', 'on Main Street downtown')
Lunch service hours (e.g. '11:00 AM – 3:00 PM') — for table bookings
Dinner service hours (e.g. '6:00 PM – 10:30 PM') — for table bookings
Heritage line (e.g. '85-year culinary legacy', 'family-run since 1998', 'new this year')
variables.default: Family-run kitchen with care for every plate.

variables.prompt: One-sentence tagline that captures your food's vibe
Closing line in the agent's voice (e.g. 'Nanni! Enjoy! 🍛', 'Grazie! Buon appetito! 🍝')
Menu categories, comma-separated (e.g. 'Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks')
Example delivery areas, comma-separated (used as a prompt for customers, e.g. 'Al Karama, Jumeirah, Deira')
